saved_questions.cached_sql: SELECT machine_name, ROUND(AVG(weld_cur), 2) AS AVG_WELD_CURRENT FROM V_PERIODIC_DATA_INTERVAL2 WHERE weld_cur > 0 GROUP BY machine_name ORDER BY AVG_WELD_CURRENT DESC
